symbols.name: extract_targets
symbols.docstring:
Extract assignment targets, handling tuple unpacking.

    Only extracts identifier targets. Attribute and subscript targets are
    skipped — they create references, not declarations.

symbols.name: extract_docstring
symbols.docstring: Extract docstring from a function or class definition.

symbols.name: determine_reference_kind
symbols.docstring: Classify a non-attribute identifier reference based on its parent.

symbols.name: determine_attribute_ref_kind
symbols.docstring: Classify an attribute-access reference as READ or WRITE based on context.

symbols.name: build_symbol_id_for_scope
symbols.docstring: Build a symbol_id for a specific scope (used for global/nonlocal redirects).

symbols.name: resolve_relative_import
symbols.docstring:
Resolve a relative import to an absolute module path.

    For ``models/__init__.py`` with ``from .user import X``:
        module_name=".user" → "models.user"
    For ``pkg/sub/mod.py`` with ``from ..other import X``:
        module_name="..other" → "pkg.other"
